text:
Created attachment 188301
patch to update the port

- update 1.26 -> 1.29
Changes: http://cpansearch.perl.org/src/DAVIDO/Set-Scalar-1.29/ChangeLog
- add LICENSE
- add NO_ARCH
- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- Tested with poudriere 3.2.99.20171111 at 11.1-release-amd64 with perl 5.24.3
- Buil-in perl tests in a clean jail say: "PASS".
